chunks.title: Arrival of the Ark and Initial Offerings
chunks.reason: Narrative account of bringing the ark to Jerusalem, offering sacrifices, and appointing Levitical musicians.

chunks.title: David's Song of Thanksgiving
chunks.reason: A unified liturgical poem celebrating God's covenant, history, and majesty, framed by narrative markers.

chunks.title: Appointment of Priests and Levites
chunks.reason: Narrative conclusion detailing the establishment of worship teams at Jerusalem and Gibeon.
